articles.title: White House Insider Confesses: How Big Pharma Kept RFK Jr. From Exposing Health Corruption
articles.summary: Former White House public health official admits she deliberately blocked Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from the West Wing, now acknowledging she was wrong to suppress his anti-establishment health agenda. This confession reveals the coordinated effort within government to silence voices challenging pharmaceutical industry capture of health policy.

articles.title: Major Cancer Researcher Hit With Retraction as Paper Mill Fraud Infiltrates Top Journals
articles.summary: Leading cancer researcher faces retraction amid growing evidence of systematic research fraud. The incident exposes how paper mills are corrupting even prestigious publications, undermining the integrity of oncology research that patients depend on for life-or-death treatment decisions.

articles.title: Psychiatry Journal Refuses to Retract Fraudulent Paxil Safety Study Despite $3 Billion Settlement
articles.summary: Despite GlaxoSmithKline paying billions for hiding Paxil's dangers, the psychiatric establishment won't retract the original misleading safety paper. Instead, they issued a worthless 'expression of concern,' protecting the reputation of antidepressants over patient safety.

articles.title: Strawberry Compound Fisetin Destroys 'Zombie Cells'—But Don't Expect Pharma to Fund This Research
articles.summary: New research shows fisetin from strawberries clears senescent cells and reverses blood vessel aging, offering natural longevity benefits. This groundbreaking anti-aging science gets buried while Big Pharma pushes expensive synthetic drugs with dangerous side effects.

articles.title: Your Mouth Bacteria Predicts Death—Why Isn't This Revolutionizing Medicine?
articles.summary: Revolutionary research shows oral microbiome imbalances predict lifespan, frailty, cancer, and heart disease better than many expensive tests. This simple, accessible diagnostic tool threatens the medical industrial complex's profit model of complex, costly interventions.

articles.title: New Manifesto Exposes Century-Long War Against Natural Healing—From Flexner Report to FDA Persecution
articles.summary: 'Echoes of Courage' documents how corporations and government systematically destroyed holistic medicine, from the Flexner Report's medical school takeover to FDA raids on alternative practitioners. This historical exposé reveals the coordinated campaign to eliminate healing modalities that threaten pharmaceutical profits.

articles.title: New Book Exposes Hidden Vaccine Dangers and Legal Coercion From 1853 to COVID
articles.summary: 'The Unseen War' reveals the historical pattern of vaccine mandates enforced through fear campaigns, from the 1853 Vaccination Act to Jacobson v. Massachusetts and the 1955 Cutter Incident. The book exposes how rushed approvals and corporate immunity create a system designed to prioritize profits over safety.

articles.title: Federal COVID Indictments Could Finally Break Washington's Science Secrecy Machine
articles.summary: New federal indictments related to COVID could shatter the wall of secrecy protecting government health officials from accountability. This legal breakthrough might finally expose the coordinated suppression of dissenting scientific voices during the pandemic response.

articles.title: White House Insider Confesses: How I Kept RFK Jr. Out to Protect Pharma Interests
articles.summary: Former White House public health official admits to deliberately blocking Robert F. Kennedy Jr. from influencing policy, revealing the coordinated effort to silence vaccine critics and protect pharmaceutical profits. The confession exposes how political operatives served as gatekeepers for industry interests over public health transparency.

articles.title: Big Pharma's Strawberry Suppression: Why Fisetin Research Gets Buried While Patent Pills Profit
articles.summary: New studies prove strawberry compound fisetin reverses vascular aging and clears senescent cells more effectively than expensive pharmaceuticals. Yet this natural anti-aging breakthrough remains buried while Big Pharma pushes patented alternatives that can't match nature's efficacy.

articles.title: Century of Medical Tyranny Exposed: From Flexner Report to FDA's War on Natural Healing
articles.summary: New manifesto reveals the systematic dismantling of holistic medicine through coordinated corporate and government assault spanning over 100 years. Documents how pioneers like Benedict Lust were persecuted while pharmaceutical monopolies cemented their stranglehold on healthcare.

articles.title: Your Mouth Reveals What Medicine Won't: Oral Microbiome Predicts Death Better Than Blood Tests
articles.summary: Groundbreaking research shows oral bacteria patterns predict lifespan and disease risk more accurately than conventional diagnostics, yet mainstream medicine ignores this accessible biomarker. The findings threaten expensive testing monopolies by proving a simple mouth swab outperforms costly procedures.

articles.title: Top Cancer Researcher Caught Red-Handed: Major Retraction Exposes Research Fraud
articles.summary: Leading cancer researcher forced to retract key study amid fraud allegations, highlighting the systemic corruption in oncology research. The case reveals how prestigious journals and institutions protect fraudulent researchers while suppressing legitimate challenges to cancer orthodoxy.

articles.title: FDA Enables ImmunityBio's $2B Cancer Scam: Agency's Cozy Relationship With Biotech Exposed
articles.summary: ImmunityBio loses $2 billion market cap after FDA finally flags misleading cancer claims, revealing how regulatory capture allows biotech companies to defraud investors for years. The delayed action exposes the agency's systematic failure to protect patients and investors from medical fraud.

articles.title: Psychiatry's Paxil Cover-Up Continues: Journal Refuses Retraction Despite $3B Settlement for Fraud
articles.summary: Despite GlaxoSmithKline paying billions for hiding Paxil's dangers, psychiatric journals still won't retract the fraudulent safety studies that enabled mass prescription of deadly antidepressants. The psychiatric establishment prioritizes reputation over patient lives by issuing worthless 'expressions of concern' instead of full retractions.

articles.title: Peer Review Gatekeepers Exposed: How Academic Cartels Suppress Revolutionary Research
articles.summary: New analysis reveals how the peer review system has become a weapon of scientific censorship, allowing establishment gatekeepers to suppress breakthrough research that threatens entrenched interests. The broken system rewards conformity while burying innovations that could transform medicine.

articles.summary: New manifesto documents how corporations systematically dismantled holistic healing through regulatory capture. The Flexner Report weaponized medical education while FDA continues persecuting alternative therapies that threaten pharmaceutical profits.

articles.summary: Research reveals oral microbiome imbalances correlate with accelerated aging, cancer, and heart disease even without gum disease. This paradigm-shifting connection between mouth bacteria and lifespan gets minimal attention from conventional medicine.

articles.summary: New book reveals historical pattern of vaccine coercion through fear and legal force, highlighting suppressed disasters like the 1955 Cutter Incident. Documents how rushed approvals and corporate liability shields endanger public health.

articles.summary: Federal indictment marks breakthrough in COVID accountability after years of stonewalling and cover-ups. This could open floodgates for prosecuting officials who suppressed treatments, silenced scientists, and violated constitutional rights.

articles.summary: Brownstone Institute identifies Greg Folkers as key Fauci deputy who helped orchestrate COVID response deception. His role in gain-of-function funding and treatment suppression makes him prime candidate for criminal prosecution.

articles.title: Peer Review System Exposed as Broken—Here's the Evidence-Based Fix
articles.summary: Systematic breakdown of how peer review became gatekeeping tool for suppressing inconvenient science. Analysis reveals how journals protect establishment narratives while blocking breakthrough research that challenges pharmaceutical orthodoxy.

articles.summary: Oral microbiome imbalances correlate with accelerated aging, cancer, and heart disease even without gum disease symptoms. This breakthrough proves oral health is a window to systemic disease, yet dentistry and medicine remain siloed while patients die.

articles.summary: The first COVID-related federal indictment signals potential collapse of Washington's pandemic cover-up machine. James Bovard examines whether this breakthrough will finally expose the lies, censorship, and constitutional violations that defined the COVID response.
